.gitignore.zh: Git 忽略规则，排除构建产物、IDE 本地状态和运行缓存
.gitignore.en: Git ignore rules excluding build outputs, local IDE state, and runtime caches

.java-version.zh: 项目使用的本地 Java 版本声明
.java-version.en: Local Java version declaration used by the project

.run.zh: IntelliJ IDEA 预置运行、测试和插件验证配置目录
.run.en: Predefined IntelliJ IDEA run, test, and plugin verification configurations

.run/Run Plugin.run.xml.zh: 以沙箱 IDE 启动mofish插件的运行配置，对应 Gradle runIde 任务
.run/Run Plugin.run.xml.en: Run configuration for launching the MoFish plugin in a sandbox IDE, mapped to the Gradle runIde task

.run/Run Tests.run.xml.zh: 运行项目测试的配置，对应 Gradle test 任务
.run/Run Tests.run.xml.en: Run configuration for project tests, mapped to the Gradle test task

.run/Run Verifications.run.xml.zh: 验证插件与目标 IDE 兼容性的配置，对应 Gradle verifyPlugin 任务
.run/Run Verifications.run.xml.en: Run configuration for plugin compatibility verification, mapped to the Gradle verifyPlugin task

EULA.md.zh: 最终用户许可协议文件

PRIVACY.md.zh: 隐私政策文件，说明插件数据使用与隐私边界
PRIVACY.md.en: Privacy policy describing plugin data usage and privacy boundaries

README.md.zh: 项目说明文档，介绍mofish插件、模块划分、构建命令和目录结构
README.md.en: Project README describing the MoFish plugin, module structure, build commands, and directory layout

build.gradle.kts.zh: Gradle 构建脚本，配置 Kotlin、IntelliJ Platform、OkHttp、Jsoup、kotlinx-serialization-json 和测试依赖
build.gradle.kts.en: Gradle build script configuring Kotlin, IntelliJ Platform, OkHttp, Jsoup, kotlinx-serialization-json, and test dependencies

docs/tree_file.json.zh: 仓库文件与目录用途索引，按路径维护中英文说明
docs/tree_file.json.en: Repository file and directory purpose index with bilingual descriptions by path

gradle.zh: Gradle 辅助配置目录，包含版本目录和 Wrapper 文件
gradle.en: Gradle support configuration directory containing the version catalog and wrapper files

gradle.properties.zh: 项目属性文件，定义 group、version，并启用 Gradle Configuration Cache 和 Build Cache
gradle.properties.en: Project properties defining group, version, and enabling Gradle configuration cache and build cache

gradle/libs.versions.toml.zh: Gradle 版本目录，目前集中管理 JUnit 版本
gradle/libs.versions.toml.en: Gradle version catalog, currently centralizing the JUnit version

gradle/wrapper.zh: Gradle Wrapper 二进制与下载配置目录
gradle/wrapper.en: Gradle Wrapper binary and distribution configuration directory

gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar.zh: Gradle Wrapper 启动 JAR，用于免安装运行指定 Gradle 版本
gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar.en: Gradle Wrapper bootstrap JAR used to run the configured Gradle version without a local install

gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties.zh: Gradle Wrapper 配置，声明 Gradle 发行版下载地址和校验信息
gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties.en: Gradle Wrapper configuration declaring the Gradle distribution URL and validation metadata

gradlew.zh: Unix/macOS Gradle Wrapper 启动脚本

gradlew.bat.zh: Windows Gradle Wrapper 启动脚本

settings.gradle.kts.zh: Gradle 项目设置，配置项目名称、插件版本、IntelliJ Platform 仓库和 Maven Central 仓库
settings.gradle.kts.en: Gradle settings configuring project name, plugin versions, IntelliJ Platform repositories, and Maven Central

src.zh: 插件源码与资源根目录
src.en: Plugin source and resource root directory

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool.zh: mofish插件主包，包含 actions、data、domain、services、settings、state 和 UI 模块
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool.en: Main MoFish Tool plugin package containing actions, data, domain, services, settings, state, and UI modules

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/actio.zh: IDE Action 入口，目前用于打开mofish窗口
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/actio.en: IDE action entry points, currently used to open the MoFish tool window

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/actio.zh: Tools 菜单中的打开mofish动作，激活并展示插件工具窗口
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/actio.en: Tools menu action that activates and shows the MoFish tool window

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data.zh: 行情数据层，包含远程数据源、静态回退数据源、HTTP 客户端和各市场 provider
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data.en: Quote data layer with remote data sources, static fallbacks, HTTP client, and market providers

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.zh: 统一行情数据源接口，定义股票、指数、基金、虚拟币和外汇读取能力
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Unified quote data source interface for stocks, indexes, funds, crypto, and forex

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Remote quote data source implementation aggregating market clients and providers for live data

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.zh: 静态回退数据源，在远程数据不可用时提供默认行情与示例数据
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Static fallback data source providing default quotes and sample data when remote data is unavailable

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.zh: mofish虚拟币底层行情与搜索建议实现，当前接入 CoinGecko 数据
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Underlying quote and search implementation for MoFish Crypto, currently backed by CoinGecko

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.zh: 虚拟币接口返回结构和序列化 DTO 定义
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Crypto API response structures and serialization DTO definitions

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.zh: 虚拟币行情 provider，封装搜索建议和批量报价获取逻辑
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Crypto quote provider wrapping search suggestions and batch quote retrieval

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.zh: CoinGecko 虚拟币客户端，负责 HTTP 请求、解析和领域模型转换
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: CoinGecko crypto client responsible for HTTP requests, parsing, and domain model conversion

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Underlying forex rate fetching implementation for MoFish Forex, currently backed by Bank of China pages

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Bank of China forex client that fetches and parses web table rates

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Contracts for forex data fetching and parsing

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.zh: 外汇行情 provider，组织支持的币种与牌价读取逻辑
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Forex provider organizing supported currencies and rate retrieval logic

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.zh: mofish基金底层行情与搜索建议实现，当前接入东方财富数据
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Underlying quote and search implementation for MoFish Fund, currently backed by EastMoney

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.zh: 基金接口返回结构和序列化 DTO 定义
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Fund API response structures and serialization DTO definitions

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.zh: 基金行情 provider，封装基金搜索和净值读取逻辑
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Fund quote provider wrapping fund search and NAV retrieval logic

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: EastMoney fund client for fund search, NAV requests, and response parsing

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.zh: HTTP 基础设施目录
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: HTTP infrastructure directory

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Shared HTTP client wrapping OkHttp, JSON parsing, and HTML parsing

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Underlying quote, search, and symbol normalization implementation for MoFish Stock and MoFish Index, currently backed by Tencent and Sina

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Contracts for stock quotes, search, and API responses

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/data/.en: Stock quote provider wrapping stock/index search, symbol normalization, and batch quote retrieval

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/domai.en: AI configuration model storing model service and invocation parameter settings

领域枚举集合，定义市场、资产类别、趋势和视图等共享枚举

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/domai.zh: 基金行情与净值领域模型
src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/domai.en: Fund quote and NAV domain model

持仓配置模型，记录数量、成本价和关联资产信息

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/domai.en: Reminder trigger result model recording matched rules and trigger context

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/domai.en: Stock detail snapshot model used for chart and detail page rendering

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/domai.en: Stock and index quote domain model

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/domai.en: Workspace profit snapshot model summarizing holding profit and daily gains

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/servi.en: Application-level service providing shared data sources and lifecycle capabilities

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/servi.en: Notification service sending MoFish alerts through the IDE notification system

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/servi.en: Application-level refresh scheduler service managing scheduler instances and refresh state

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/servi.en: Project-level reminder service checking alert rules and dispatching notifications

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/servi.en: Project-level watchlist service managing stock, index, fund, crypto, and forex watch entries

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/setti.en: Settings code including persistent state, configurable UI, holdings editor, and reminders editor

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/setti.en: Reminder rule editor dialog for adding, changing, and deleting price alerts

src/main/kotlin/online/mofish/tool/setti.en: IDE settings page implementation for displaying and saving MoFish configuration

src/main/resources.zh: 插件资源目录，包含 plugin.xml、图标和其他运行时资源
src/main/resources.en: Plugin resources directory containing plugin.xml, icons, and other runtime resources

src/main/resources/META-INF/plugin.xml.zh: 插件声明文件，定义插件 ID、名称、服务、设置页、工具窗口、通知组、状态栏组件、文件编辑器和菜单 Action

src/main/resources/META-INF/pluginIcon_d.en: Dark-theme plugin icon used in JetBrains Marketplace and the IDE plugin manager

src/main/resources/icons.zh: 插件 UI 图标资源目录

src/main/resources/messages.zh: 资源消息目录，预留给国际化或本地化文案资源
src/main/resources/messages.en: Resource message directory reserved for internationalization or localized text resources
